message:
fix(web): stability hardening for iOS, persistence, and loaders

- App shell: add device-aware motion/FX gating (effective scanlines/glow/background FX) and a perf-triggered FX safe mode to preserve smooth scrolling.
- iOS viewport: keep --visual-viewport-height updated via visualViewport.scroll and guard against transient 0-height reports.
- Error handling: upgrade full-page ErrorBoundary (try again vs reload, optional details, DEV-only logging) and add FeatureErrorBoundary for non-fatal feature islands.
- Loading UX: make DataLoadingOverlay slow-load detection stable (no timer reset on progress) and improve retry/reset state.
- Persistence: harden theme + store persistence against localStorage failures (private mode/quota) with graceful fallback.
- Data + workers: harden DatabaseLoader manifest/ETag flow and structure loader worker pooling (no busy-wait polling).
- Service worker: make registration idempotent and tighten SW caching scope for PDB assets.
- Misc: fix useAnimatedNumber RAF lifecycle and make TourEngine selector warnings DEV-only.

files.patch:
@@ -119,13 +119,14 @@ registerRoute(
 // PDB Structure Caching (NEW - Critical for 3D viewer)
 // =============================================================================
 
-// Cache PDB structure files from RCSB
-// These are immutable (PDB IDs don't change), so CacheFirst is optimal
+// Cache PDB/mmCIF structure files from RCSB.
+// Keep this route tightly scoped to avoid caching unintended third-party origins.
+// Structures are immutable (PDB IDs don't change), so CacheFirst is optimal.
 registerRoute(
-  ({ url }) =>
-    url.origin === 'https://files.rcsb.org' ||
-    url.origin === 'https://data.rcsb.org' ||
-    (url.origin.includes('rcsb.org') && url.pathname.includes('/pdb/')),
+  ({ url, request }) =>
+    request.method === 'GET' &&
+    url.origin === 'https://files.rcsb.org' &&
+    url.pathname.startsWith('/download/'),
   new CacheFirst({
     cacheName: CACHE_NAMES.pdb,
     plugins: [
